Part.Source: Event Start &CreAbvDup.Clear() &CreAbvDup.AddItem('N', 'TODAS AS DUPLICATAS A PAGAR') &CreAbvDup.AddItem('S', 'OCULTAR CRÉDITOS CLIENTES!') &CreDupIsAce.Clear() &CreDupIsAce.AddItem('T', 'EXCETO REJEITADAS') &CreDupIsAce.AddItem('S', 'SOMENTE COM ACEITE') &CreDupIsAce.AddItem('N', 'SOMENTE SEM ACEITE') &CreDupIsAce.AddItem('R', 'REJEITADAS') LoadWWPContext.Call(&Context) &EmpCod = &Context.EmpCod &PesCod = &Context.PesCod &CreFilPgt = &Context.FilCod &DuplicatsSelecionadas = 'SEL_WWDuplicataPagar' retornaAutorizacao.Call('WWDUPLICATAPAGAR', Status_SimNao.Sim, 1, &AutNiv) retornaAutorizacao.Call('WWDUPLICATAS', Status_SimNao.Nao, 1, &DuplicatasAutNiv) if &DuplicatasAutNiv < 2 btnuserInserir.Visible = 0 &UserUpdate.Visible = 0 Endif RetornaConfSistema.Call(&EmpCod, &Context.FilCod, domConfSistema.TCon211_ControleAceitePagamento, &TCon211_ControleAceitePagamento) tbAceiteFiltro.Visible = false tbAceite.Visible = false if &TCon211_ControleAceitePagamento = 'S' tbAceiteFiltro.Visible = true tbAceite.Visible = true Endif /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &TotCreVlrSdo.Visible = False Grid.Rows = Page.Rows Grid_Empowerer.GridInternalName = Grid.InternalName DDO_GridColumnsSelector.GridInternalName = Grid.InternalName JSDynamicFilters.Caption = '' &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'CREDUPNRO' Do 'EnableDynamicFilters1' &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'CREDUPNRO' Do 'EnableDynamicFilters2' &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'CREDUPNRO' Do 'EnableDynamicFilters3' AddDynamicFilters1.JSEvent('onclick', format(!"WWPDynFilterShow_AL('%1', 2, 0)", TableDynamicFilters.InternalName)) RemoveDynamicFilters1.JSEvent('onclick', format(!"WWPDynFilterHideLast_AL('%1', 3, 0)", TableDynamicFilters.InternalName)) AddDynamicFilters2.JSEvent('onclick', format(!"WWPDynFilterShow_AL('%1', 3, 0)", TableDynamicFilters.InternalName)) RemoveDynamicFilters2.JSEvent('onclick', format(!"WWPDynFilterHideLast_AL('%1', 3, 0)", TableDynamicFilters.InternalName)) RemoveDynamicFilters3.JSEvent('onclick', format(!"WWPDynFilterHideLast_AL('%1', 3, 0)", TableDynamicFilters.InternalName)) ddo_Expp.TitleControlIdToReplace = BtnExpp.InternalName &ExppData = new() &ExppDataItem = new() &ExppDataItem.Title = 'Monitora Saldos' &ExppDataItem.EventKey = !'Saldo' &ExppDataItem.IsDivider = False &ExppData.Add(&ExppDataItem) &ExppDataItem = new() &ExppDataItem.Title = 'Novo Adiantamento' &ExppDataItem.Link = WPAdiantamentoPedidos.Link('WWDuplicataPagar') &ExppDataItem.IsDivider = False &ExppData.Add(&ExppDataItem) &ExppDataItem = new() &ExppDataItem.Title = 'Exportar PDF' &ExppDataItem.EventKey = !'Exportar_PDF' &ExppDataItem.IsDivider = False &ExppData.Add(&ExppDataItem) &ExppDataItem = new() &ExppDataItem.Title = 'Exportar Excel' &ExppDataItem.Icon = ActionExport.Link() &ExppDataItem.EventKey = !'Export' &ExppDataItem.IsDivider = False &ExppData.Add(&ExppDataItem) &CreDupIsAce = nullvalue(&CreDupIsAce) &CreRecPag = ReceberPagar.Pagar &CreSts = nullvalue(&CreSts) DDO_Grid.GridInternalName = Grid.InternalName Form.Caption = 'A PAGAR' Do 'PrepareTransaction' Do 'LoadGridState' &OrderedBy.Clear() &OrderedBy.AddItem(1, 'Vct.Cresc.') &OrderedBy.AddItem(2, 'Vct.Decr.') &OrderedBy.AddItem(3, 'Número') &OrderedBy.AddItem(4, 'Número') &OrderedBy.AddItem(5, 'Emis.') &OrderedBy.AddItem(6, 'Aceite') &OrderedBy.AddItem(7, 'Vcto.') &OrderedBy.AddItem(8, 'Pedido For.') If &OrderedBy < 1 &OrderedBy = 1 Do 'SetDDOSortedStatus' EndIf &OrderedDsc.Visible = False &DDO_TitleSettingsIcons = GetWWPTitleSettingsIcons() DDO_GridColumnsSelector.TitleControlIdToReplace = BtnEditColumns.InternalName GridPaginationBar.RowsPerPageSelectedValue = Grid.Rows /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event Refresh &DuplicatsSelecionadas = 'SEL_WWDuplicataPagar' &SdtPagamentoDuplicata.Clear() /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ LoadWWPContext.Call(&Context) &DynamicFiltersOperator1.Clear() Do Case Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'CREVLRDUP' &DynamicFiltersOperator1.AddItem(0, "<") &DynamicFiltersOperator1.AddItem(1, "=") &DynamicFiltersOperator1.AddItem(2, ">") Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'CREPEDNUM' &DynamicFiltersOperator1.AddItem(0, "<") &DynamicFiltersOperator1.AddItem(1, "=") &DynamicFiltersOperator1.AddItem(2, ">") EndCase If &DynamicFiltersEnabled2 &DynamicFiltersOperator2.Clear() Do Case Case &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'CREVLRDUP' &DynamicFiltersOperator2.AddItem(0, "<") &DynamicFiltersOperator2.AddItem(1, "=") &DynamicFiltersOperator2.AddItem(2, ">") Case &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'CREPEDNUM' &DynamicFiltersOperator2.AddItem(0, "<") &DynamicFiltersOperator2.AddItem(1, "=") &DynamicFiltersOperator2.AddItem(2, ">") EndCase If &DynamicFiltersEnabled3 &DynamicFiltersOperator3.Clear() Do Case Case &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'CREVLRDUP' &DynamicFiltersOperator3.AddItem(0, "<") &DynamicFiltersOperator3.AddItem(1, "=") &DynamicFiltersOperator3.AddItem(2, ">") Case &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'CREPEDNUM' &DynamicFiltersOperator3.AddItem(0, "<") &DynamicFiltersOperator3.AddItem(1, "=") &DynamicFiltersOperator3.AddItem(2, ">") EndCase EndIf EndIf Do 'SaveGridState' If &Session.Get(!'wwDuplicataPagarColumnsSelector') <> '' &ColumnsSelectorXML = &Session.Get(!'wwDuplicataPagarColumnsSelector') &ColumnsSelector.FromXml(&ColumnsSelectorXML) Else Do 'InitializeColumnsSelector' EndIf CrePedLctCod.Visible = &ColumnsSelector.Columns.Item(1).IsVisible &CreNovCliRaz.Visible = &ColumnsSelector.Columns.Item(2).IsVisible &CreDupNroWithTags.Visible = &ColumnsSelector.Columns.Item(3).IsVisible CreDtaEms.Visible = &ColumnsSelector.Columns.Item(4).IsVisible CreDtaAce.Visible = &ColumnsSelector.Columns.Item(5).IsVisible CreDtaVct.Visible = &ColumnsSelector.Columns.Item(6).IsVisible CreVlrSdo.Visible = &ColumnsSelector.Columns.Item(7).IsVisible &CreVlrPgt.Visible = &ColumnsSelector.Columns.Item(8).IsVisible &TipoBaixa.Visible = &ColumnsSelector.Columns.Item(9).IsVisible &AuxPedido.Visible = &ColumnsSelector.Columns.Item(10).IsVisible CreVenCod.Visible = &ColumnsSelector.Columns.Item(11).IsVisible CreCbrCod.Visible = &ColumnsSelector.Columns.Item(12).IsVisible CreFilPgt.Visible = &ColumnsSelector.Columns.Item(13).IsVisible CrePedNum.Visible = &ColumnsSelector.Columns.Item(14).IsVisible &Salvar.Visible = &ColumnsSelector.Columns.Item(15).IsVisible &GridCurrentPage = Grid.CurrentPage &GridPageCount = Grid.PageCount &CreDupNroWithTags.ColumnHeaderClass = !'WWColumn' &AuxPedido.ColumnHeaderClass = !'WWColumn' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ &Hoje = serverdate() if &CreDtaVct_To.IsEmpty() &CreDtaVct_To = &Hoje Endif if &CreDtaVct.IsEmpty() &CreDtaVct = &Hoje.AddDays(-365) Endif PadraoUsuarioHora.Call('L', 'WWDuplicataPagar', &Context.PesCod, &Context.EmpCod, &PadObs, &PadDtaMod, &PadDtaHorMod, 'P') If not &PadObs.IsEmpty() and &PadDtaMod = &Hoje &CrePagDta = ctod(Substr(&PadObs,1,10)) Else &CrePagDta = &Hoje // Data do Crédito EndIF Do 'loadSelecionados' EndEvent Event GridPaginationBar.ChangePage /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ Do Case Case GridPaginationBar.SelectedPage = !'Previous' Grid.PreviousPage() Case GridPaginationBar.SelectedPage = !'Next' Grid.NextPage() Otherwise &PageToGo.FromString(GridPaginationBar.SelectedPage) Grid.GotoPage(&PageToGo) EndCase /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event GridPaginationBar.ChangeRowsPerPage /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ Grid.Rows = GridPaginationBar.RowsPerPageSelectedValue Grid.FirstPage() /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event DDO_Grid.OnOptionClicked /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ Do Case Case DDO_Grid.ActiveEventKey = !'<#OrderASC#>' OR DDO_Grid.ActiveEventKey = !'<#OrderDSC#>' &OrderedBy.FromString(DDO_Grid.SelectedValue_get) &OrderedDsc = iif(DDO_Grid.ActiveEventKey = !'<#OrderDSC#>', true, false) Do 'SetDDOSortedStatus' Grid.FirstPage() EndCase /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event Grid.Load &CreVlrPgt.Enabled = false &TipoBaixa.Enabled = false &Salvar.Enabled = true Do CAse CAse CreFrpPgtoTip = TipoDuplicata.CHEQUET and CreCheCod <> 0 &UserUpdate.Link = wpLancarCheque1.Link('ADD', EmpCod, CreCheCod) CAse CreFrpPgtoTip = TipoDuplicata.CHEQUEP and CreCheCod <> 0 &UserUpdate.Link = wpLancarChequeProprio.Link('ADD', EmpCod, CreCheCod) Otherwise &UserUpdate.Link = AddDuplicatas.Link('WWDUPLICATAPAGAR', 'UPD', EmpCod, FilCod, CreCod) EndCase CreDtaVct.ForeColor = IIF(CreDtaVct < ServerDate(),RGB(255,0,0),RGB(0,0,0)) if CrePedCod <> 0 &AuxPedido.Link = VerPedido.Link(&Pgmname, EmpCod,FilCod,CrePedCod) Else &AuxPedido.Link = '' Endif /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &UserUpdate = !'' &ActionSelecione.FromImage(DDOMultiselSelOption) &ActionSelecione.TooltipText = "" if CreNovCliRaz_Formula.Length() > 30 &CreNovCliRaz = substr(CreNovCliRaz_Formula, 1, 30) + '...' Else &CreNovCliRaz = CreNovCliRaz_Formula EndIf if CreAbvDup.IsEmpty() or CreAbvDup.IsNull() AtualizaSaldoDuplicata.Call(EmpCod, CreCod, FilCod) &AuxPedido = CreAbvDup_FORMULA Else &AuxPedido = CreAbvDup Endif &CreDupNroWithTags.ColumnClass = iif(CreDupNro like '%CREDITO%' or &AuxPedido like '%DV%', !'WWColumn WWColumnInfo WWColumnInfoSingleCell', !'WWColumn') &AuxPedido.ColumnClass = iif(CreDupNro like '%CREDITO%' or &AuxPedido like '%DV%', !'WWColumn WWColumnInfo WWColumnInfoSingleCell', !'WWColumn') &CreDupNroWithTags = CreDupNro If CreFrpPgtoTip = TipoDuplicata.DINHEIRO &CreDupNroWithTags = !"" + &CreDupNroWithTags EndIf If CreFrpPgtoTip = TipoDuplicata.DUPLICATA &CreDupNroWithTags = !"" + &CreDupNroWithTags EndIf If CreFrpPgtoTip = TipoDuplicata.CARTAOC &CreDupNroWithTags = !"" + &CreDupNroWithTags EndIf If CreFrpPgtoTip = TipoDuplicata.CARTAOD &CreDupNroWithTags = !"" + &CreDupNroWithTags EndIf If CreFrpPgtoTip = TipoDuplicata.CHEQUET &CreDupNroWithTags = !"" + &CreDupNroWithTags EndIf If CreFrpPgtoTip = TipoDuplicata.CHEQUEP &CreDupNroWithTags = !"" + &CreDupNroWithTags EndIf If CreFrpPgtoTip = TipoDuplicata.PIX &CreDupNroWithTags = !"" + &CreDupNroWithTags EndIf If CreFrpPgtoTip = TipoDuplicata.DEPOSITO &CreDupNroWithTags = !"" + &CreDupNroWithTags EndIf /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ if CreVlrSdo <> CreVlrDup CreVlrSdo.ForeColor = RGB(255,100,0) Else CreVlrSdo.ForeColor = RGB(0,0,0) Endif CreVlrSdo.TooltipText = 'VALOR DUPLICATA: R$ '+ trim(toformattedString(CreVlrDup)) &CreDupNroWithTags.Link = verDuplicata.Link('wwDuplicaPagar', EmpCod, FilCod, CreCod) &AuxCreCod = CreCod &CreDupSel = False &CreVlrPgt = 0 Do 'IsSelecionado' Do Case CAse &TCon211_ControleAceitePagamento = 'S' and (CreDupIsAce.IsEmpty() and CreDupIsAce.IsNull() or CreDupIsAce = DuplicataAceite.SEM_ACEITE or CreDupIsAce = DuplicataAceite.REJEITADA) and &CreDupSel = true &ActionSelecione.FromImage(DDOMultiselSelOptionAceite) CAse &TCon211_ControleAceitePagamento = 'S' and (CreDupIsAce.IsEmpty() and CreDupIsAce.IsNull() or CreDupIsAce = DuplicataAceite.SEM_ACEITE or CreDupIsAce = DuplicataAceite.REJEITADA) and &CreDupSel = false &ActionSelecione.FromImage(DDOMultiselOptionAceite) // CAse &TCon211_ControleAceitePagamento = 'S' and (CreDupIsAce = DuplicataAceite. ) // &ActionSelecione.FromImage(DDOMultiselSelOptionAceite) Case &CreDupSel = true //and (&TCon211_ControleAceitePagamento <> 'S' or (not CreDtaAce.IsEmpty() and not CreDtaAce.IsNull())) &ActionSelecione.FromImage(DDOMultiselSelOption) &CreVlrPgt.Enabled = true &TipoBaixa.Enabled = true Otherwise &ActionSelecione.FromImage(DDOMultiselOption) EndCase EndEvent Event &OrderedBy.Click /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ Do 'SetDDOSortedStatus' Refresh /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event DDO_GridColumnsSelector.OnColumnsChanged /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &ColumnsSelectorXML = DDO_GridColumnsSelector.ColumnsSelectorValues &ColumnsSelector.FromJson(&ColumnsSelectorXML) SaveColumnsSelectorState(!'wwDuplicataPagarColumnsSelector', &ColumnsSelector.ToXml()) Refresh /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event 'AddDynamicFilters1' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &DynamicFiltersEnabled2 = True AddDynamicFilters1.Visible = False RemoveDynamicFilters1.Visible = True /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event 'RemoveDynamicFilters1' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &DynamicFiltersRemoving = True &DynamicFiltersIgnoreFirst = True Do 'SaveDynFiltersState' Do 'ResetDynFilters' Do 'LoadDynFiltersState' &DynamicFiltersRemoving = False &DynamicFiltersIgnoreFirst = False Grid.Refresh() /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event &DynamicFiltersSelector1.Click /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &DynamicFiltersOperator1.SetEmpty() Do 'EnableDynamicFilters1' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event 'AddDynamicFilters2' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &DynamicFiltersEnabled3 = True AddDynamicFilters2.Visible = False RemoveDynamicFilters2.Visible = True /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event 'RemoveDynamicFilters2' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &DynamicFiltersRemoving = True &DynamicFiltersEnabled2 = False Do 'SaveDynFiltersState' Do 'ResetDynFilters' Do 'LoadDynFiltersState' &DynamicFiltersRemoving = False Grid.Refresh() /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event &DynamicFiltersSelector2.Click /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &DynamicFiltersOperator2.SetEmpty() Do 'EnableDynamicFilters2' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event 'RemoveDynamicFilters3' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &DynamicFiltersRemoving = True &DynamicFiltersEnabled3 = False Do 'SaveDynFiltersState' Do 'ResetDynFilters' Do 'LoadDynFiltersState' &DynamicFiltersRemoving = False Grid.Refresh() /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event &DynamicFiltersSelector3.Click /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &DynamicFiltersOperator3.SetEmpty() Do 'EnableDynamicFilters3' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event 'DouserInserir' addDuplicatas.Link('WWDUPLICATAPAGAR', 'INS', 0,0,0) /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event 'DoMarcar' For Each Line If CreSts <> Status_Duplicata.CANCELADA //and (&TCon211_ControleAceitePagamento <> 'S' or (not CreDtaAce.IsEmpty() and not CreDtaAce.IsNull())) &IsAchou = false &CreDupSel = true For &SdtPagamentoDuplicataItem in &SdtPagamentoDuplicata If &SdtPagamentoDuplicataItem.CreCod = CreCod and &SdtPagamentoDuplicataItem.FilCod = FilCod &IsAchou = true EndIf EndFor if &IsAchou = false If CreSts = Status_Duplicata.DESCONTADA // CreSts = 'D' = Descontadas &mensagem += 'DUPLICATAS DESCONTADAS/NEGOCIADAS, NÃO VÃO GERAR CRÉDITOS NO CAIXA!' + NewLine() Endif &CreVlrPgt = CreVlrSdo &SdtPagamentoDuplicataItem = new() &sdtPagamentoDuplicataItem.EmpCod = EmpCod &SdtPagamentoDuplicataItem.CreCod = CreCod &SdtPagamentoDuplicataItem.FilCod = FilCod &SdtPagamentoDuplicataItem.CreCliCod = CreCliCod &SdtPagamentoDuplicataItem.CreCliRaz = CreCliRaz &SdtPagamentoDuplicataItem.CreCliCodRaz = trim(Str(CreCliCod))+'-'+Trim(CreCliRaz) &SdtPagamentoDuplicataItem.CreVlrPgt = &CreVlrPgt &SdtPagamentoDuplicataItem.CreVlrSdo = CreVlrSdo &SdtPagamentoDuplicataItem.CreCbrCod = CreCbrCod &SdtPagamentoDuplicataItem.CrePedCod = CrePedCod &SdtPagamentoDuplicataItem.CreDupNro = CreDupNro &SdtPagamentoDuplicataItem.CreDupIsAce = CreDupIsAce &SdtPagamentoDuplicataItem.CreDtaEms = CreDtaEms &SdtPagamentoDuplicataItem.CreEnvSpc = CreEnvSpc &sdtPagamentoDuplicataItem.MovCpl = 'CL:' + trim(str(CreCliCod)) + ' - ' + trim(CreCliRaz) &SdtPagamentoDuplicataItem.CreSts = CreSts &SdtPagamentoDuplicataItem.CrePlanCod = CrePlanCod RetornaPlanCodNomVir.Call(EmpCod, CrePlanCod, &PLanCodNomVir) &SdtPagamentoDuplicataItem.CrePlanCodNomVir = &PLanCodNomVir &SdtPagamentoDuplicataItem.Mensagem = &mensagem // VALIDA TIPO BAIXA &TipoBaixa = 'T' &SdtPagamentoDuplicataItem.CreTipBxa.FromString(&TipoBaixa) &SdtPagamentoDuplicata.Add(&SdtPagamentoDuplicataItem) EndIf Else Msg('ATENÇÃO! Esta Duplicata está Cancelada e não pode ser selecionada. Verifique! ') EndIf EndFor do 'GravaSelecionadas' Refresh /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event ddo_Expp.OnOptionClicked /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ Do Case Case ddo_Expp.ActiveEventKey = !'Saldo' Do 'Do Saldo' Case ddo_Expp.ActiveEventKey = !'Exportar_PDF' Do 'Do Exportar_PDF' Case ddo_Expp.ActiveEventKey = !'Export' Do 'DoExport' EndCase /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event 'DoBaixar' //controle de Aceite duplicatas &IsTemSemAceite = false if &TCon211_ControleAceitePagamento = 'S' for &SdtPagamentoDuplicataItem in &SdtPagamentoDuplicata if &SdtPagamentoDuplicataItem.CreDupIsAce <> 'S' //sem aceite &IsTemSemAceite = true Exit Endif EndFor Endif do 'GravaPadrao' Do case CAse &IsTemSemAceite = true msg('Existem duplicatas selecionadas sem ACEITE Pagamento, Pagamento não autorizado!') CAse &CrePagDta.IsEmpty() msg('Data da baixa não pode ser vazia!') &CrePagDta = &Hoje &CrePagDta.SetFocus() CAse &SdtPagamentoDuplicata.Count = 0 msg('Nenhum Registro selecionado!') Otherwise padraoUsuarioHora.Call('G', 'HAVERSERLECIONADO_FCHDV', &Context.PesCod, &Context.EmpCod, '', &PadDtaMod, &PadDtaHorMod, 'P') &GUID = GUID.NewGuid() &WebSession.Set(&GUID.ToString(),&SdtPagamentoDuplicata.Toxml()) PagamentoDuplicata.Link(&CreFilPgt,&CrePagDta, 'WWDuplicataPagar', &GUID.ToString()) EndCAse /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event 'DoAceite' If &SdtPagamentoDuplicata.Count = 0 msg('Nenhum Registro selecionado!') Else &GUID = GUID.NewGuid() &WebSession.Set(&GUID.ToString(),&SdtPagamentoDuplicata.ToJson()) /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ wpRealizarAceite.Call(&Pgmname, &GUID.ToString()) /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndIF EndEvent Sub 'SetDDOSortedStatus' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ DDO_Grid.SortedStatus = &OrderedBy.ToString().Trim() + !':' + iif(&OrderedDsc, !'DSC', !'ASC') /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'InitializeColumnsSelector' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &ColumnsSelector = new WWPColumnsSelector() WWP_ColumnsSelector_Add(&ColumnsSelector, !"CrePedLctCod", '', !'Lct', False, '') WWP_ColumnsSelector_Add(&ColumnsSelector, !"&CreNovCliRaz", '', !'Nome/Razão For.', True, '') WWP_ColumnsSelector_Add(&ColumnsSelector, !"CreDupNro", '', !'Número', True, '') WWP_ColumnsSelector_Add(&ColumnsSelector, !"CreDtaEms", '', !'Emis.', True, '') WWP_ColumnsSelector_Add(&ColumnsSelector, !"CreDtaAce", '', !'Aceite', False, '') WWP_ColumnsSelector_Add(&ColumnsSelector, !"CreDtaVct", '', !'Vcto.', True, '') WWP_ColumnsSelector_Add(&ColumnsSelector, !"CreVlrSdo", '', !'À Pagar', True, '') WWP_ColumnsSelector_Add(&ColumnsSelector, !"&CreVlrPgt", '', !'Pagou?', True, '') WWP_ColumnsSelector_Add(&ColumnsSelector, !"&TipoBaixa", '', !'Baixa', True, '') WWP_ColumnsSelector_Add(&ColumnsSelector, !"&AuxPedido", '', !'Origem', True, '') WWP_ColumnsSelector_Add(&ColumnsSelector, !"CreVenCod", '', !'Vnd.', False, '') WWP_ColumnsSelector_Add(&ColumnsSelector, !"CreCbrCod", '', !'LC', False, '') WWP_ColumnsSelector_Add(&ColumnsSelector, !"CreFilPgt", '', !'F.', False, '') WWP_ColumnsSelector_Add(&ColumnsSelector, !"CrePedNum", '', !'Pedido For.', False, '') WWP_ColumnsSelector_Add(&ColumnsSelector, !"&Salvar", '', !'', True, '') &UserCustomValue = LoadColumnsSelectorState.Udp(!'wwDuplicataPagarColumnsSelector') If not(&UserCustomValue.IsEmpty()) &ColumnsSelectorAux.FromXml(&UserCustomValue) WWP_ColumnSelector_UpdateColumns(&ColumnsSelectorAux, &ColumnsSelector) EndIf /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'EnableDynamicFilters1' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &CreDupNro1.Visible = False &CreCbrNom1.Visible = False &CreVlrDup1.Visible = False &CrePedNum1.Visible = False &DynamicFiltersOperator1.Visible = False Do Case Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'CREDUPNRO' &CreDupNro1.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'CRECBRNOM' &CreCbrNom1.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'CREVLRDUP' &CreVlrDup1.Visible = True &DynamicFiltersOperator1.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'CREPEDNUM' &CrePedNum1.Visible = True &DynamicFiltersOperator1.Visible = True EndCase /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'EnableDynamicFilters2' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &CreDupNro2.Visible = False &CreCbrNom2.Visible = False &CreVlrDup2.Visible = False &CrePedNum2.Visible = False &DynamicFiltersOperator2.Visible = False Do Case Case &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'CREDUPNRO' &CreDupNro2.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'CRECBRNOM' &CreCbrNom2.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'CREVLRDUP' &CreVlrDup2.Visible = True &DynamicFiltersOperator2.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'CREPEDNUM' &CrePedNum2.Visible = True &DynamicFiltersOperator2.Visible = True EndCase /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'EnableDynamicFilters3' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &CreDupNro3.Visible = False &CreCbrNom3.Visible = False &CreVlrDup3.Visible = False &CrePedNum3.Visible = False &DynamicFiltersOperator3.Visible = False Do Case Case &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'CREDUPNRO' &CreDupNro3.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'CRECBRNOM' &CreCbrNom3.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'CREVLRDUP' &CreVlrDup3.Visible = True &DynamicFiltersOperator3.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'CREPEDNUM' &CrePedNum3.Visible = True &DynamicFiltersOperator3.Visible = True EndCase /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'ResetDynFilters' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &DynamicFiltersEnabled2 = False &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'CREDUPNRO' &CreDupNro2.SetEmpty() Do 'EnableDynamicFilters2' &DynamicFiltersEnabled3 = False &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'CREDUPNRO' &CreDupNro3.SetEmpty() Do 'EnableDynamicFilters3' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'Do Saldo' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'Do Exportar_PDF' Do 'LoadGridState' InNewWindow1.Target = RelatorioDuplicataPagar_Total_PDF.Link() InNewWindow1.Height = !'600' InNewWindow1.Width = !'800' InNewWindow1.OpenWindow() /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'LoadGridState' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ // Load grid state from session. If &Session.Get(&PgmName + !"GridState") = !"" &GridState.FromXml(LoadGridState.Udp(&PgmName + !"GridState")) Else &GridState.FromXml(&Session.Get(&PgmName + !"GridState")) Endif &OrderedBy = &GridState.OrderedBy &OrderedDsc = &GridState.OrderedDsc Do 'SetDDOSortedStatus' For &GridStateFilterValue in &GridState.FilterValues Do Case Case &GridStateFilterValue.Name = !"CRECLICOD" &CreCliCod.FromString(&GridStateFilterValue.Value) Case &GridStateFilterValue.Name = !"CRECLIRAZ" &CreCliRaz.FromString(&GridStateFilterValue.Value) Case &GridStateFilterValue.Name = !"CREABVDUP" &CreAbvDup.FromString(&GridStateFilterValue.Value) Case &GridStateFilterValue.Name = !"CREDUPISACE" &CreDupIsAce.FromString(&GridStateFilterValue.Value) Case &GridStateFilterValue.Name = !"CREFILPGT" &CreFilPgt.FromString(&GridStateFilterValue.Value) Case &GridStateFilterValue.Name = !"CRERECPAG" &CreRecPag.FromString(&GridStateFilterValue.Value) Case &GridStateFilterValue.Name = !"CRESTS" &CreSts.FromString(&GridStateFilterValue.Value) Case &GridStateFilterValue.Name = !"CREVLRSDO" &CreVlrSdo.FromString(&GridStateFilterValue.Value) Case &GridStateFilterValue.Name = !"CREDTAVCT" &CreDtaVct.FromString(&GridStateFilterValue.Value) &CreDtaVct_To.FromString(&GridStateFilterValue.ValueTo) EndCase EndFor Do 'LoadDynFiltersState' If not &GridState.PageSize.Trim().IsEmpty() Grid.Rows = &GridState.PageSize.ToNumeric() EndIf Grid.CurrentPage = &GridState.CurrentPage /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ if &TCon211_ControleAceitePagamento <> 'S' &CreDupIsAce = 'T' Endif // &filtroCreCliCod = &CreCliCod EndSub Sub 'LoadDynFiltersState' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ AddDynamicFilters1.Visible = True RemoveDynamicFilters1.Visible = False &DynamicFiltersOperator1.Visible = False AddDynamicFilters2.Visible = True RemoveDynamicFilters2.Visible = False &DynamicFiltersOperator2.Visible = False &DynamicFiltersOperator3.Visible = False If &GridState.DynamicFilters.Count >= 1 &GridStateDynamicFilter = &GridState.DynamicFilters.Item(1) &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = &GridStateDynamicFilter.Selected Do Case Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'CREDUPNRO' &CreDupNro1.FromString(&GridStateDynamicFilter.Value) Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'CRECBRNOM' &CreCbrNom1.FromString(&GridStateDynamicFilter.Value) Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'CREVLRDUP' &DynamicFiltersOperator1 = &GridStateDynamicFilter.Operator &CreVlrDup1.FromString(&GridStateDynamicFilter.Value) Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'CREPEDNUM' &DynamicFiltersOperator1 = &GridStateDynamicFilter.Operator &CrePedNum1.FromString(&GridStateDynamicFilter.Value) EndCase Do 'EnableDynamicFilters1' If &GridState.DynamicFilters.Count >= 2 JSDynamicFilters.Caption = !'' EndIf EndIf If &DynamicFiltersRemoving JSDynamicFilters.Caption = '' EndIf /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'SaveGridState' if &TCon211_ControleAceitePagamento <> 'S' &CreDupIsAce = 'T' Endif /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &GridState.FromXml(&Session.Get(&PgmName + !"GridState")) // Save grid state in session. &GridState.OrderedBy = &OrderedBy &GridState.OrderedDsc = &OrderedDsc &GridState.FilterValues.Clear() WWP_GridStateAddFilterValue(&GridState, !"CRECLICOD", "", not &CreCliCod.IsEmpty(), 0, &CreCliCod.ToString().Trim(), '') WWP_GridStateAddFilterValue(&GridState, !"CRECLIRAZ", "", not &CreCliRaz.IsEmpty(), 0, &CreCliRaz, '') WWP_GridStateAddFilterValue(&GridState, !"CREABVDUP", "", not &CreAbvDup.IsEmpty(), 0, &CreAbvDup, '') WWP_GridStateAddFilterValue(&GridState, !"CREDUPISACE", "", not &CreDupIsAce.IsEmpty(), 0, &CreDupIsAce, '') WWP_GridStateAddFilterValue(&GridState, !"CREFILPGT", "", not &CreFilPgt.IsEmpty(), 0, &CreFilPgt.ToString().Trim(), '') WWP_GridStateAddFilterValue(&GridState, !"CRERECPAG", "", true, 0, &CreRecPag, '') WWP_GridStateAddFilterValue(&GridState, !"CRESTS", "", not &CreSts.IsEmpty(), 0, &CreSts, '') WWP_GridStateAddFilterValue(&GridState, !"CREVLRSDO", "", not &CreVlrSdo.IsEmpty(), 0, &CreVlrSdo.ToString().Trim(), '') WWP_GridStateAddFilterValue(&GridState, !"CREDTAVCT", "", not (&CreDtaVct.IsEmpty() AND &CreDtaVct_To.IsEmpty()), 0, &CreDtaVct.ToString().Trim(), &CreDtaVct_To.ToString().Trim()) Do 'SaveDynFiltersState' &GridState.PageSize = str(Grid.Rows) &GridState.CurrentPage = Grid.CurrentPage SaveGridState.Call(&PgmName + !"GridState", &GridState.ToXml()) /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'SaveDynFiltersState' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &GridState.DynamicFilters.Clear() If not &DynamicFiltersIgnoreFirst &GridStateDynamicFilter = new() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Selected = &DynamicFiltersSelector1 Do Case Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'CREDUPNRO' AND not &CreDupNro1.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &CreDupNro1.ToString() Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'CRECBRNOM' AND not &CreCbrNom1.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &CreCbrNom1.ToString() Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'CREVLRDUP' AND not &CreVlrDup1.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &CreVlrDup1.ToString() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Operator = &DynamicFiltersOperator1 Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'CREPEDNUM' AND not &CrePedNum1.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &CrePedNum1.ToString() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Operator = &DynamicFiltersOperator1 EndCase If &DynamicFiltersRemoving OR not &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value.IsEmpty() &GridState.DynamicFilters.Add(&GridStateDynamicFilter) EndIf EndIf If &DynamicFiltersEnabled2 &GridStateDynamicFilter = new() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Selected = &DynamicFiltersSelector2 Do Case Case &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'CREDUPNRO' AND not &CreDupNro2.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &CreDupNro2.ToString() Case &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'CRECBRNOM' AND not &CreCbrNom2.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &CreCbrNom2.ToString() Case &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'CREVLRDUP' AND not &CreVlrDup2.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &CreVlrDup2.ToString() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Operator = &DynamicFiltersOperator2 Case &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'CREPEDNUM' AND not &CrePedNum2.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &CrePedNum2.ToString() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Operator = &DynamicFiltersOperator2 EndCase If &DynamicFiltersRemoving OR not &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value.IsEmpty() &GridState.DynamicFilters.Add(&GridStateDynamicFilter) EndIf EndIf If &DynamicFiltersEnabled3 &GridStateDynamicFilter = new() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Selected = &DynamicFiltersSelector3 Do Case Case &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'CREDUPNRO' AND not &CreDupNro3.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &CreDupNro3.ToString() Case &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'CRECBRNOM' AND not &CreCbrNom3.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &CreCbrNom3.ToString() Case &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'CREVLRDUP' AND not &CreVlrDup3.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &CreVlrDup3.ToString() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Operator = &DynamicFiltersOperator3 Case &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'CREPEDNUM' AND not &CrePedNum3.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &CrePedNum3.ToString() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Operator = &DynamicFiltersOperator3 EndCase If &DynamicFiltersRemoving OR not &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value.IsEmpty() &GridState.DynamicFilters.Add(&GridStateDynamicFilter) EndIf EndIf /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'PrepareTransaction' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &TrnContext = new() &TrnContext.CallerObject = &Pgmname &TrnContext.CallerOnDelete = True &TrnContext.CallerURL = &HTTPRequest.ScriptName + !"?" + &HTTPRequest.QueryString &TrnContext.TransactionName = !"Duplicatas" &Session.Set(!"TrnContext", &TrnContext.ToXml()) /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'DoExport' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ // Generate Excel spreadsheet and download it. Do 'LoadGridState' ExportwwDuplicataPagar.Call(&ExcelFilename, &ErrorMessage) If (&ExcelFilename <> "") Link(&ExcelFilename) Else msg(&ErrorMessage) Endif /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Event 'DoSaldo' WWSaldo.Call() EndEvent Event &ActionSelecione.Click &ActionSelecione.FromImage(DDOMultiselOption) if &CreDupSel = true if &TCon211_ControleAceitePagamento = 'S' and (CreDupIsAce.IsEmpty() and CreDupIsAce.IsNull() or CreDupIsAce = DuplicataAceite.SEM_ACEITE or CreDupIsAce = DuplicataAceite.REJEITADA) &ActionSelecione.FromImage(DDOMultiselOptionAceite) Else &ActionSelecione.FromImage(DDOMultiselOption) Endif &CreDupSel = false &CreVlrPgt.Enabled = False &TipoBaixa.Enabled = false Else &CreDupSel = true If &TCon211_ControleAceitePagamento = 'S' and (CreDupIsAce.IsEmpty() and CreDupIsAce.IsNull() or CreDupIsAce = DuplicataAceite.SEM_ACEITE or CreDupIsAce = DuplicataAceite.REJEITADA) &ActionSelecione.FromImage(DDOMultiselSelOptionAceite) Else &ActionSelecione.FromImage(DDOMultiselSelOption) &CreVlrPgt.Enabled = true &TipoBaixa.Enabled = true Endif Endif If CreSts <> Status_Duplicata.CANCELADA If &CreDupSel = True // Se estiver Marcada If CreSts = Status_Duplicata.DESCONTADA // CreSts = 'D' = Descontadas &mensagem += 'DUPLICATAS DESCONTADAS/NEGOCIADAS, NÃO VÃO GERAR CRÉDITOS NO CAIXA!' + NewLine() Endif &CreVlrPgt = CreVlrSdo &SdtPagamentoDuplicataItem = new() &sdtPagamentoDuplicataItem.EmpCod = EmpCod &SdtPagamentoDuplicataItem.CreCod = CreCod &SdtPagamentoDuplicataItem.FilCod = FilCod &SdtPagamentoDuplicataItem.CreCliCod = CreCliCod &SdtPagamentoDuplicataItem.CreCliRaz = CreCliRaz &SdtPagamentoDuplicataItem.CreCliCodRaz = trim(Str(CreCliCod))+'-'+Trim(CreCliRaz) &SdtPagamentoDuplicataItem.CreVlrPgt = &CreVlrPgt &SdtPagamentoDuplicataItem.CreVlrSdo = CreVlrSdo &SdtPagamentoDuplicataItem.CreCbrCod = CreCbrCod &SdtPagamentoDuplicataItem.CrePedCod = CrePedCod &SdtPagamentoDuplicataItem.CreDupNro = CreDupNro &SdtPagamentoDuplicataItem.CreDupIsAce = CreDupIsAce &SdtPagamentoDuplicataItem.CreDtaEms = CreDtaEms &SdtPagamentoDuplicataItem.CreEnvSpc = CreEnvSpc &sdtPagamentoDuplicataItem.MovCpl = 'CL:' + trim(str(CreCliCod)) + ' - ' + trim(CreCliRaz) &SdtPagamentoDuplicataItem.CreSts = CreSts &SdtPagamentoDuplicataItem.CrePlanCod = CrePlanCod RetornaPlanCodNomVir.Call(EmpCod, CrePlanCod, &PLanCodNomVir) &SdtPagamentoDuplicataItem.CrePlanCodNomVir = &PLanCodNomVir &SdtPagamentoDuplicataItem.Mensagem = &mensagem &TipoBaixa = 'T' &SdtPagamentoDuplicataItem.CreTipBxa.FromString(&TipoBaixa) &SdtPagamentoDuplicata.Add(&SdtPagamentoDuplicataItem) Else For &SdtPagamentoDuplicataItem in &SdtPagamentoDuplicata If &SdtPagamentoDuplicataItem.CreCod = CreCod &auxCreVlrSdo = &SdtPagamentoDuplicataItem.CreVlrSdo &Index = &SdtPagamentoDuplicata.IndexOf(&SdtPagamentoDuplicataItem) &SdtPagamentoDuplicata.Remove(&Index) Exit EndIF EndFor &CreVlrPgt = 0 EndIF Else Msg('ATENÇÃO! Esta Duplicata está Cancelada e não pode ser selecionada. Verifique! ') EndIf do 'GravaSelecionadas' &CreVlrPgt.SetFocus() EndEvent Event limpar_campo.Click &SdtPagamentoDuplicata.Clear() do 'GravaSelecionadas' Refresh EndEvent Event &CreFilPgt.Click &SdtPagamentoDuplicata.Clear() do 'GravaSelecionadas' EndEvent Event &CreVlrPgt.IsValid if &OldCreVlrPgt <> &CreVlrPgt For &SdtpagamentoDuplicataItem in &SdtpagamentoDuplicata If &SdtpagamentoDuplicataItem.CreCod = CreCod &SdtpagamentoDuplicataItem.CreVlrPgt = &CreVlrPgt Exit EndIf EndFor do 'GravaSelecionadas' &OldCreVlrPgt = &CreVlrPgt Endif EndEvent Event &TipoBaixa.IsValid if &OldCreTipBxa <> &TipoBaixa For &SdtpagamentoDuplicataItem in &SdtpagamentoDuplicata If &SdtpagamentoDuplicataItem.CreCod = CreCod &SdtpagamentoDuplicataItem.CreTipBxa.FromString(&TipoBaixa) Exit EndIf EndFor do 'GravaSelecionadas' &OldCreTipBxa = &TipoBaixa Endif EndEvent Event &CreDtaVct.IsValid If not &CreDtaVct.IsEmpty() and &CreDtaVct_To < &CreDtaVct &CreDtaVct_To = &CreDtaVct EndIf EndEvent Event 'Prompt' 4 PromptFornecedores.Popup(&EmpCod, &CreCliCod) EndEvent Sub 'GravaSelecionadas' padraoUsuarioHora.Call('G', &DuplicatsSelecionadas, &Context.PesCod, &Context.EmpCod, &SdtPagamentoDuplicata.ToJson(), &PadDtaMod, &PadDtaHorMod, 'P') do 'Totaliza' EndSub Sub 'Totaliza' &numeric = &SdtpagamentoDuplicata.Count &TotCreVlrSdo = 0 For &SdtpagamentoDuplicataItem in &SdtpagamentoDuplicata &TotCreVlrSdo += &SdtPagamentoDuplicataItem.CreVlrPgt EndFor DuplicatasSelect.Caption = format('%1 - DUPLICATAS = R$ %2', trim(ToformattedString(&numeric)), trim(toformattedString(&TotCreVlrSdo))) EndSub Sub 'GravaPadrao' &PadObs = DTOC(&CrePagDta) padraoUsuarioHora.Call('G', 'WWDuplicataReceber', &Context.PesCod, &Context.EmpCod, &PadObs, &PadDtaMod, &PadDtaHorMod, 'P') EndSub Sub 'loadSelecionados' padraoUsuarioHora.Call('L', &DuplicatsSelecionadas, &Context.PesCod, &Context.EmpCod, &PadObs, &PadDtaMod, &PadDtaHorMod, 'P') &SdtpagamentoDuplicata.FromJson(&PadObs) do 'Totaliza' EndSub Sub 'IsSelecionado' &TipoBaixa = 'T' For &SdtpagamentoDuplicataItem in &SdtpagamentoDuplicata If &SdtpagamentoDuplicataItem.CreCod = &AuxCreCod &CreDupSel = true &CreVlrPgt = &SdtpagamentoDuplicataItem.CreVlrPgt &TipoBaixa = &SdtpagamentoDuplicataItem.CreTipBxa.ToString() exit EndIf EndFor EndSub

/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */
